root.sql: SELECT sc_mem_m_tran_group.doc_no, sc_mem_m_tran_group.membership_no, pka_com_function.fp_get_member_name(sc_mem_m_tran_group.membership_no) as memname, sc_mem_m_tran_group.group_old, pka_com_function.fp_get_group_name(sc_mem_m_tran_group.group_old) as group_old_name, sc_mem_m_tran_group.group_new, pka_com_function.fp_get_group_name(sc_mem_m_tran_group.group_new) as group_new_name, sc_mem_m_tran_group.entry_date, sc_mem_m_tran_group.entry_id, sc_mem_m_tran_group.app_status, sc_mem_m_tran_group.app_date, sc_mem_m_tran_group.app_id , si_security_user.user_name FROM sc_mem_m_tran_group, si_security_user where sc_mem_m_tran_group.entry_id = si_security_user.user_id and sc_mem_m_tran_group.app_status = '2' /*WHERE*/ order by sc_mem_m_tran_group.doc_no
